quiz.title: Grade 4 Reading – Deeper Comprehension
quiz.subject: Reading
quiz.description: Read passages and answer questions about inference, cause/effect, and main idea.

questions.question: Passage: The old bridge was shaky and weak. Workers decided to replace it with a strong new one made of steel. Why did they replace the bridge?
Passage: Lightning flashed and thunder roared. Everyone ran inside just before the heavy rain started. What caused people to run inside?
Passage: Elephants use their trunks to drink, eat, and even greet friends. The trunk is like a long nose and hand combined. What is the main idea?
Passage: Anna studied hard for the test. She got every question right and earned a perfect score. How did Anna feel after the test?
Passage: The library was quiet except for pages turning. Kids read books about space and animals. Why was the library quiet?
options: It is a rule to be quiet
questions.correct_answer: It is a rule to be quiet

questions.question: Passage: Pollution in rivers harms fish and plants. People clean up trash to help. What is the effect of cleaning rivers?
Passage: The explorer climbed the mountain slowly. At the top, he saw snow-capped peaks all around. What does 'snow-capped' mean?
options: Covered in snow at the top
questions.correct_answer: Covered in snow at the top

questions.question: Passage: When the power went out, the family used candles and told stories. They had fun even without lights. What is the main idea?
Passage: Butterflies start as caterpillars. They eat leaves, then make a chrysalis, and finally emerge with wings. What happens after the chrysalis stage?
Passage: The team practiced every day after school. Their hard work paid off when they won the championship. Why did they win?
